allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\Clark\\AppData\\Local'' -Filter ''Python*'' -Directory 2>$null | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files'' -Filter ''*node*'' -Directory 2>$null | Select-Object FullName")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command Invoke-WebRequest -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online -FeatureName IIS-WebServerRole 2>$null | Select-Object State")
